summary: P1 Invoice PDF Generation + Finance Export Testing Complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Minor frontend issue with DB ready status check.

ui_bugs.issue: DB hazır değil banner shown even when db_status='ok' because health endpoint returns status='degraded' due to migration_required. Frontend check uses `res.data?.db_status === 'ok' || res.data?.status === 'healthy'` but status is 'degraded' not 'healthy'.
ui_bugs.workaround: API endpoint /api/health returns status='healthy' while /api/health/db returns status='degraded'. Consider using /api/health or adjusting check logic.

action_items: Consider fixing AdminInvoices.js DB check to use /api/health instead of /api/health/db, or adjust logic to prioritize db_status over status
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice snapshot fields correctly populated: net_amount_minor, tax_amount_minor, gross_amount_minor, currency, tax_rate, billing_info_snapshot
PDF generate-pdf endpoint is idempotent - returns already_generated on subsequent calls
regenerate-pdf correctly restricted to super_admin only (country_admin gets 403)
download-pdf respects country scope - country_admin can only download PDFs for their country
finance/export endpoint properly scoped - country_admin exports are filtered by their country
All audit events (PDF_GENERATED, PDF_REGENERATED, PDF_DOWNLOADED, EXPORT_TRIGGERED) logged correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing invoices for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features complete. PDF endpoints working: generate-pdf (idempotent), regenerate-pdf (super_admin only), download-pdf (country scoped). Finance export endpoint /api/admin/finance/export works for payments/invoices/ledger with proper RBAC. Minor frontend issue: AdminInvoices.js shows 'DB hazır değil' banner due to health check returning status='degraded' instead of 'healthy' (migrations pending). Backend APIs all working correctly.

invoice_snapshot_immutable_fields.billing_info_snapshot: PASS - present in response with user details

country_scope_isolation.country_admin_view_FR_invoice: N/A - no FR invoices to test

frontend_admin_invoices.db_banner_issue: MINOR ISSUE - shows warning even when db_status=ok

frontend_finance_overview.export_buttons: PASS - all three visible for country_admin and super_admin
